global.dateFull: Sunday, the twentieth of December, two thousand twenty-six

welcomeScreen.subtitle: Join us in celebrating
welcomeScreen.bottomText1: Request the honor of your presence
welcomeScreen.bottomText2: On Sunday, the twentieth of December, two thousand twenty-six

ourStory.title: A Serendipitous Encounter
ourStory.description: Our eyes first met across the crowded terrace of Cafe de Flore in Paris. It took just one shared look, an accidental spill of a coffee cup, and an hour of endless laughter to realize our worlds had shifted permanently.

ourStory.title: An Evening of Whispers
ourStory.description: Our first formal date was under the soft winter haze of London. We strolled along the banks of the Seine, talking about dreams, philosophies, and music. By midnight, we knew this was no ordinary courtship.

ourStory.title: By the Cliffs of Amalfi
ourStory.description: Under the golden dusk of Positano, perched on a private terrace hanging between the blue heavens and quiet waves, Hans bent his knee and asked the question that would seal our destinies.

ourStory.title: The Path to Forever
ourStory.description: As we prepare to declare our eternal promises, we are filled with boundless joy to gather those who have walked beside us on our journeys. Our final chapter as two is closing, and a lifetime as one is about to begin.

ceremony.title: The Ceremony
ceremony.description: Witness the beginning of our forever as we exchange vows in the sacred and solemn ambiance of the Church Of Christ. Surrounded by faith, love, and the blessings of our families and friends, we invite you to share in this meaningful celebration of our union.
ceremony.address: Nagserialan Camiling, Paniqui - Camiling Rd, Paniqui, Tarlac
ceremony.calendarDesc: Hans and Czay Union - Paniqui, Tarlac

reception.title: The Reception
reception.description: As the sun sets, join us for an intimate celebration in a charming open farm beneath the canopy of mango trees. Surrounded by nature and the warm glow of twinkling bubble lights, enjoy an evening filled with laughter, heartfelt moments, delicious food, and joyful dancing as we celebrate the start of our new journey together.
reception.calendarDesc: Dinner, Cocktails, & Dance - DokNWellness Natural Health Care Center

dressCode.title: Formal Black Tie Optional
dressCode.description: To honor our vision of a beautiful, cohesive atmosphere in Tarlac, we respectfully request our guests to dress in harmony with our burgundy and gold color story.
dressCode.ladiesGuideline: Floor-length gowns or refined midi-cocktail dresses in shades of burgundy, blush, antique gold, or warm neutrals. Flowing silhouettes and romantic laces are highly welcomed.
dressCode.gentlemenGuideline: Classic dinner suit (Tuxedo) or tailored suit with crisp white dress shirts. Deep charcoal, navy, or black tailored coordinates. Bowties or silk ties matching the theme are preferred.

faq.q: Can I bring a plus one?
faq.a: To help us maintain an accurate guest count, attendance is limited to individuals who have received a digital invitation and a unique RSVP code. Only guests included in the invitation and successfully registered using the provided code will be accommodated. Unfortunately, those who did not receive an invitation code are not included in our guest list. We sincerely appreciate your understanding and cooperation as we celebrate this special day with our invited family and friends.

To allow all our guests—including parents—a night of relaxation and uninhibited celebration, we have chosen for our wedding weekend to be an adults-only affair. We thank you in advance for your understanding and hope you can join us to raise a glass in comfort.
The ceremony will commence promptly at 3:00 PM. We recommend arriving 30 to 60 minutes prior (between 2:00 PM and 2:30 PM) to comfortably enjoy a welcome refreshment and find your seats.

Yes, the style guidelines are Formal Black Tie Optional. Gentlemen are encouraged to wear classic dinner suits (tuxedos) or tailored coordinates. Ladies are invited to wear floor-length or refined midi dresses matching our neutral palette.

faq.q: Can I take photos or videos?
faq.a: We respectfully request an "unplugged" ceremony where all phones and cameras remain off so that you can be fully present with us. You are more than welcome to capture memories during the cocktail hour and reception dinner!

faq.q: Where is the venue and is parking available?
faq.a: All celebrations take place within our designated venues in Paniqui, Tarlac. Secure valet and open parking spaces are fully accommodated at the entrance of both properties for all driving guests.

faq.q: Can I give gifts or cash?
faq.a: Your love, laughter, and presence on our special day are the greatest gifts we could receive. Should you wish to honor us with a contribution towards our new life together, details can be found in the registry section.

We understand that unforeseen circumstances may arise. If you are unable to attend, please submit your RSVP and select either "Regretfully Declines" or provide the details of your designated proxy, if applicable. Kindly note that only responses received through the RSVP system will be considered. Guests who do not submit an RSVP by the stated deadline will be assumed unable to attend, and their reserved seat may be released accordingly. Thank you for helping us finalize our guest arrangements.

faq.q: Who can I contact for questions?
faq.a: For any additional logistics or questions, please reach, at +63 995 179 2240 / +63 945 728 7481.
